title: MICA/MICB-Mediated NKG2D Immune Escape in Cervical Cancer: Single-Cell Transcriptomic Mapping of Radionuclide Therapy Targets for Precision Radioimmunotherapy.
snippet: Cervical cancer harbors a profoundly immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment (TME) that impairs innate and adaptive antitumor immunity and, critically, limits the efficacy of emerging radioimmunotherapy strategies. The NKG2D receptor-ligand axis-comprising the stress-inducible ligands MICA and MICB-constitutes a pivotal innate immune recognition interface....

title: Siglec-15 binds mucin-domain glycoproteins with extended glycans and marks an osteoclast-like, matrix remodeling myeloid state in human tumors.
snippet: Siglec-15 has emerged as a therapeutic target in cancer, yet the glycan determinants and protein scaffolds that mediate engagement between Siglec-15-expressing myeloid cells and tumor cells remain incompletely defined. Here, we investigated the molecular basis of Siglec-15 recognition of cancer cells and examined transcriptional as well as functional progra...

title: Circular RNAs in tumor biology and immunology: molecular mechanisms and therapeutic implications.
snippet: Cancer immunotherapy has revolutionized oncology, yet its efficacy remains frequently constrained by the immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment (TME). Circular RNAs (circRNAs) are covalently closed RNA molecules generated through back-splicing. Their lack of free ends confers strong resistance to exonuclease degradation and high molecular stability. Withi...

title: Spatial-temporal recurrence patterns of grade 4 glioma using deep learning integrated multiparametric MRI and molecular pathology.
snippet: Grade 4 glioma is inherently lethal due to inevitable recurrence. Current radiotherapy guidelines recommend uniform target volume margins, disregarding molecular and clinical variables. We hypothesized that spatiotemporal recurrence may be predicted by molecular and phenotypic features present already at diagnosis. We analyzed 390 paired MRIs of grade 4 gli...
